name: phaeton-etl-loader
description: Node.js ETL loader for Phaeton TP app: parses daily 1C Excel exports (price list, discounts, debt, addresses, sales, plan, missing invoices) into the SQLite/Prisma database, and exports formed orders into the 1C upload template.

scripts.test: echo 'No automated test suite yet -- verified via `npm run load` against samples/, see README.md' && exit 0
